mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN digest_status = 'undigest' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS undigest_count, SUM(CASE WHEN digest_status = 'digesting' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS digesting_count, SUM(CASE WHEN digest_status = 'digested' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS digested_count, SUM(CASE WHEN digest_status = 'abandoned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abandoned_count, SUM(CASE WHEN is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unread_count FROM collection_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
